title: Travel Duʿās
description: Supplications for setting out, journeying, and returning home.

items.summary: A comprehensive supplication for setting out on a journey.

cardText.arabic: سُبْحَانَ الَّذِي سَخَّرَ لَنَا هَذَا وَمَا كُنَّا لَهُ مُقْرِنِينَ وَإِنَّا إِلَى رَبِّنَا لَمُنقَلِبُونَ
cardText.transliteration: Subhana alladhi sakhkhara lana hadha wa ma kunna lahu muqrinin, wa inna ila Rabbina lamunqalibun.
cardText.translation: Glory is to Him who has subjected this to us, and we could never have it by our efforts; surely to our Lord we are returning.

focusPhrases.arabic: سُبْحَانَ الَّذِي سَخَّرَ لَنَا هَذَا وَمَا كُنَّا لَهُ مُقْرِنِينَ وَإِنَّا إِلَى رَبِّنَا لَمُنقَلِبُونَ
focusPhrases.transliteration: Subhana alladhi sakhkhara lana hadha wa ma kunna lahu muqrinin, wa inna ila Rabbina lamunqalibun.
focusPhrases.translation: Glory is to Him who has subjected this to us, and we could never have it by our efforts; surely to our Lord we are returning.

items.summary: A short remembrance when returning from a journey.

cardText.translation: Returning, repenting, worshipping, and praising our Lord.

focusPhrases.translation: Returning, repenting, worshipping, and praising our Lord.
